creator: sixday@sixday.hu
text:
Okay I managed to fix it:

stop gitlab service
pkg delete -f rubygem-gitlab_git
check: "gem list | grep gitlab_git" is empty (it has to be)
gem install gitlab_git --version 10.3.2
re-do the upgrade procedure from Torsten's documentation (db migrate and assets clear/rebuild).

Thanks for @Vladimir for the fix!!!
